title: Psionicolor
description: An addon for Psi that adds more colorizers and other color related things
body:
This is an addon for [Psi](https://modrinth.com/mod/psi), it adds more colorizers since the selection of colorizers is too limited in vanilla psi in my opinion.

### Colorizers added:
* Neon versions of the 16 dye colorizers that are more vibrant and flicker occasionally
* Clock colorizer, changes color with the time of day
* Rockin colorizer, named and themed after the "psi rockin" attack from earthbound
* Random colorizer, changes to random colors
* Grape flavored colorizer, alternates between shades of purple
* Lemon-lime flavored colorizer, alternates between yellow and green
* Fiery colorizer, alternates between yellow and orange
* Configurable colorizer, can be changed to any color with a spell

### Hybrid colorizers:
* Hybrid suspension colorizer, alternates between the two colorizers you put into it
* Indicating suspension colorizer, fades to the secondary color as you lose psi
* Triggered suspension colorizer, changes to the secondary color when you cast and fades back

### Spell pieces added:
* Selector: nearby colorizers, returns a list of dropped colorizer items near a position
* Operator: entity colorizer, gets the colorizer in the cad of an entity
* Trick: conjure colored block, conjures a block with the specified color
* Trick: conjure colored light, conjures a light with the specified color
* Trick: fill colorizer, fills a configurable colorizer with a color
* Trick: fill caster colorizer, fills a configurable colorizer in the caster's cad with a color

Feel free to suggest colorizers for me to add.
